PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-16-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated Jan-29-2019 is admitted to probate. Elizabeth M. McQuillan is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Nov-23-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
